testCases.title: The retention pop-up should appear when the user attempts to leave the booking flow via back button
preconditions: User is in the booking flow for any supported product (e.g., hotel, flight, train, bus, car rental, activity)

steps.content: Tap the device back button while in the booking flow
steps.expected: Retention pop-up appears

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should be displayed when user taps back button during booking flow

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should appear when the user attempts to leave the booking flow via close icon
preconditions: User is in the booking flow for any supported product

steps.content: Tap the close icon (X) in the booking flow
steps.expected: Retention pop-up appears

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should be displayed when user taps close icon during booking flow

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should not appear when the booking is already completed
preconditions: User has completed the booking flow

steps.content: Attempt to leave the completed booking screen
steps.expected: No retention pop-up appears

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should not be displayed after booking completion

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should appear when the user swipes to exit the booking flow
preconditions: User is in the booking flow for any supported product

steps.content: Swipe right (or left, as per app navigation) to exit booking flow
steps.expected: Retention pop-up appears

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should be displayed when user swipes to exit booking flow

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should not appear when user navigates to a non-booking section
preconditions: User is outside the booking flow

steps.content: Navigate to any section outside booking flow (e.g., home, support)
steps.expected: No retention pop-up appears

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should not be displayed outside booking flow

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should display hotel-specific messaging when user attempts to leave hotel booking flow
preconditions: User is in hotel booking flow

steps.content: Attempt to leave hotel booking flow
steps.expected: Retention pop-up appears with hotel-specific urgency message

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should display hotel-specific copy as per Figma when leaving hotel booking flow

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should display flight-specific messaging when user attempts to leave flight booking flow
preconditions: User is in flight booking flow

steps.content: Attempt to leave flight booking flow
steps.expected: Retention pop-up appears with flight-specific urgency message

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should display flight-specific copy as per Figma when leaving flight booking flow

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should display train-specific messaging when user attempts to leave train booking flow
preconditions: User is in train booking flow

steps.content: Attempt to leave train booking flow
steps.expected: Retention pop-up appears with train-specific urgency message

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should display train-specific copy as per Figma when leaving train booking flow

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should display bus-specific messaging when user attempts to leave bus booking flow
preconditions: User is in bus booking flow

steps.content: Attempt to leave bus booking flow
steps.expected: Retention pop-up appears with bus-specific urgency message

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should display bus-specific copy as per Figma when leaving bus booking flow

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should display car rental-specific messaging when user attempts to leave car rental booking flow
preconditions: User is in car rental booking flow

steps.content: Attempt to leave car rental booking flow
steps.expected: Retention pop-up appears with car rental-specific urgency message

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should display car rental-specific copy as per Figma when leaving car rental booking flow

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should display activity-specific messaging when user attempts to leave activity booking flow
preconditions: User is in travel activity booking flow

steps.content: Attempt to leave activity booking flow
steps.expected: Retention pop-up appears with activity-specific urgency message

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should display activity-specific copy as per Figma when leaving activity booking flow

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should display correct messaging for mixed bookings when user attempts to leave combined booking flow
preconditions: User is in a booking flow with multiple product types (e.g., flight + hotel)

steps.content: Attempt to leave combined booking flow
steps.expected: Retention pop-up appears with appropriate messaging for all booked products

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should display messaging that covers all relevant product types in mixed booking flows

testCases.title: The continue booking button should return user to booking flow when user taps continue booking
preconditions: Retention pop-up is displayed

steps.content: Tap the 'Continue booking' button on the pop-up
steps.expected: User is returned to the booking flow

testCases.expectedResult: User should be returned to booking flow when 'Continue booking' is tapped

testCases.title: The leave for now button should exit booking flow when user taps leave for now
preconditions: Retention pop-up is displayed

steps.content: Tap the 'Leave for now' button on the pop-up
steps.expected: User exits booking flow and is navigated to previous or home screen

testCases.expectedResult: User should exit booking flow when 'Leave for now' is tapped

testCases.title: The action buttons should be disabled when pop-up is loading or not fully rendered
preconditions: Retention pop-up is loading or not fully rendered

steps.content: Attempt to tap action buttons during pop-up loading
steps.expected: Buttons are disabled and do not trigger actions

testCases.expectedResult: Action buttons should be disabled during pop-up loading

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should display coupon messaging when coupon is applied to booking
preconditions: User has applied a coupon to booking

steps.content: Attempt to leave booking flow with coupon applied
steps.expected: Retention pop-up appears with coupon-specific messaging

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should display coupon-specific copy as per Figma when coupon is applied

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should not display coupon messaging when no coupon is applied
preconditions: No coupon applied to booking

steps.content: Attempt to leave booking flow without coupon applied
steps.expected: Retention pop-up appears without coupon-specific messaging

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should not display coupon-specific copy when no coupon is applied

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should match Figma design for layout and copy when displayed
preconditions: Retention pop-up is displayed

steps.content: Compare pop-up layout and copy with Figma design
steps.expected: Pop-up matches Figma layout and copy

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should match Figma design for layout and copy

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should display correctly on devices with different screen sizes and orientations when displayed
preconditions: Retention pop-up is displayed

steps.content: Rotate device to landscape and portrait orientations
steps.expected: Pop-up displays correctly in both orientations

steps.content: View pop-up on devices with small and large screens
steps.expected: Pop-up displays correctly on all screen sizes

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should display correctly across device sizes and orientations

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should be accessible via screen reader when displayed
preconditions: Retention pop-up is displayed
Screen reader is enabled

steps.content: Enable screen reader and navigate to retention pop-up
steps.expected: Screen reader reads pop-up content and action buttons

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should be accessible via screen reader

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should have sufficient contrast for text and buttons when displayed
preconditions: Retention pop-up is displayed

steps.content: Check color contrast of pop-up text and buttons
steps.expected: Contrast meets accessibility standards

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should have sufficient contrast for accessibility

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should support increased font size when accessibility settings are enabled
preconditions: Retention pop-up is displayed
Device accessibility settings for font size are enabled

steps.content: Enable increased font size in device settings
steps.expected: Pop-up text scales appropriately

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should support increased font size for accessibility

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should display content in user's selected language when displayed
preconditions: Retention pop-up is displayed
User's device language is set to a supported locale

steps.content: Set device language to a supported locale
steps.expected: Pop-up content appears in selected language

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should display content in user's selected language

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should display fallback language when user's locale is unsupported
preconditions: Retention pop-up is displayed
User's device language is set to an unsupported locale

steps.content: Set device language to an unsupported locale
steps.expected: Pop-up content appears in fallback language (e.g., English)

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should display fallback language when user's locale is unsupported

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should handle rapid user actions when user double-taps exit
preconditions: User is in booking flow

steps.content: Double-tap back or close icon rapidly
steps.expected: Retention pop-up appears only once and handles input gracefully

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should handle rapid exit actions without duplicate pop-ups

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should not overlap or conflict with other modal dialogs when displayed
preconditions: Another modal dialog is already open

steps.content: Attempt to trigger retention pop-up while another modal is open
steps.expected: Retention pop-up does not overlap or conflict with existing modal

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should not overlap or conflict with other modal dialogs

testCases.title: The retention pop-up should display correctly in offline mode when triggered
preconditions: Device is offline
User is in booking flow

steps.content: Attempt to leave booking flow while offline
steps.expected: Retention pop-up appears and displays correctly

testCases.expectedResult: Retention pop-up should display correctly in offline mode
